Bangalore.layoff_trend_2025_2026: Mixed: TCS cut 12,000+ in 2025 and startup layoffs ~20-25k nationally, but Bengaluru hiring activity still +23% YoY in early 2026 driven by GCC and AI demand
sources: Zomato CEO Deepinder Goyal disclosure: avg EPH ₹102 in 2025 (gross), ~₹81 net after 20% fuel/maintenance
Numbeo Cost of Living Index May 2026 (Bangalore baseline 20.3)
Taggd / foundit Insights Tracker 2026 (Bengaluru +23% YoY hiring)
Naukri JobSpeak hiring calendar (Jan-Mar peak post-appraisal, Sep-Oct secondary)

Chennai.layoff_trend_2025_2026: Lower exposure than Bengaluru; IT services layoffs (TCS, Infosys) hit Chennai workforce but manufacturing/EV expansion offsetting. Net direction: roughly flat to slightly positive
sources: Zomato 2025 EPH disclosure (used as national anchor; Chennai discounted ~10% vs Bengaluru per fare structure)
Numbeo Cost of Living Chennai May 2026 (18.7)

Hyderabad.layoff_trend_2025_2026: Positive: fastest-growing Tier-1 GCC city YoY. Eli Lilly +1,500 jobs, Sanofi scaling to 2,600, BMS & Amgen expansion. Hiring activity +21% YoY
sources: Flexiple GCC list Hyderabad 2026, Taggd pharma hiring trends 2026

Gurgaon.layoff_trend_2025_2026: Mixed: Edtech (Byju's, Unacademy) and consumer-services layoffs hit NCR hardest in 2025; offset by GCC and consulting expansion. Net: slight negative to flat
sources: Zomato 2025 EPH disclosure (NCR fares ~5-8% above national avg)
Inc42 Layoff Tracker 2025 (edtech most-affected sector, NCR-heavy)
Flexiple GCC NCR list 2026, Taggd India job hotspots 2026

Mumbai.layoff_trend_2025_2026: Relatively resilient: BFSI hiring strong, fintech mixed. Hiring activity +22% YoY in early 2026. Media/advertising recovery offsetting startup cuts
sources: Business Standard 2025 (Mumbai auto driver case studies: ₹500-600/day net after CNG + ₹150 permit at 10 hrs)
Zomato 2025 EPH ₹102 gross (Mumbai surge ~10-15% above avg per metro fare structure)

top_3_quit_reasons: Slow promotion path to Director — limited Director slots in Indian product orgs

Strategy vs execution mismatch — pulled into delivery work, not vision
Slow growth to SrPM — bottleneck at mid-level PM band
Better offer / higher hike (40-60% jumps common in PM switches)
Lack of ownership — PM-in-name-only roles with eng-driven roadmap
Slow promotion to full PM — APM programs often lack clear graduation
Limited scope / shadow work under senior PMs
Better APM offer with higher base at competing product company
Better offer / hike (50-100% jumps standard in 2-3 yr SDE switches)
Tier-1 IT services to product company transition (TCS/Infy → Razorpay/Swiggy)
Boring / maintenance work — no greenfield or modern stack exposure
IC vs Management fork — forced into EM track without choice
Compensation ceiling — needs job switch for 40%+ hike
Tech stack stagnation / legacy codebase fatigue
Burnout — sandwich layer between leadership pressure and team morale
Want to return to IC / hands-on coding (Staff Eng track)
Slow path to Director — limited senior leadership slots
Role ambiguity — TL doing IC + people work without EM title or comp
Forced into people management without IC ladder option

Treated as pixel-pusher / no seat at product strategy table
Lack of design system / mature design org to grow in

No path to Design Manager — flat design orgs in most Indian companies
Comp ceiling — senior designer band capped vs eng equivalent
Lack of strategic / 0-to-1 work — only feature iteration
Doing dashboarding / SQL work, not actual ML / modeling

No production ML pipelines — models never deployed

Lack of MLOps maturity — can't ship models to production

Lack of respect / second-class citizen in eng org
Unrealistic quota / quota inflation year over year

Budget cuts / marketing first to be slashed in downturns
Brand vs performance marketing identity crisis — forced into perf-only
Lack of strategic seat — execution-only role under founder/CEO

Lack of product/eng support to ship growth experiments

Caught between employee advocacy and leadership directives — moral fatigue
